papers_mined.title: Spear-thrower atlatl (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Atlatl = low-mass fast-moving lever extension of throwing arm; mechanical advantage 2-6x in force/range; longer-distance force application = higher velocity.

papers_mined.title: Simple Machines and Spear Throwing: The Atlatl
Atlatl Guide: Ultimate Spear Throwing Device
papers_mined.note: Extra lever-length increases distance over which force is applied, hence higher velocity.

papers_mined.title: Atlatl & Tlacochtli (Aztec)
papers_mined.note: Without atlatl: ~41 mph, ~50 yd effective range. With atlatl: ~54 mph, ~150 yd effective range.

papers_mined.title: Demystifying Long Chain-of-Thought Reasoning (2502.03373)
papers_mined.note: Long CoT trajectories iterative exploration + reflection enhance test-time scaling reasoning.

papers_mined.title: Multi-Step Reasoning with LLMs: A Survey (ACM CSUR)
Reasoning in LLMs: From CoT to Massively Decomposed Agentic
papers_mined.note: Reasoning spans CoT prompting → decomposed agentic processes.
